pages.purpose: New user signup form. Unauthenticated users land here. Submits to POST /api/auth/register and redirects to /dashboard on success.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email Address
fields.validation: non-empty, email format (HTML email input type)

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.validation: non-empty, minlength=8 (HTML minlength attribute + server-side check)

error_messages.missing_fields: Missing required fields: name, email, password
error_messages.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long

design_tokens.font_family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

pages.purpose: Authenticated user home screen. Displays user name and email fetched from GET /api/user/me. Redirects unauthenticated visitors to /register.

design_tokens.font_family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

email.constraints: non-empty, used as unique key in users store

201.side_effects: User record written to in-memory users store; session created in sessions store
201.when: All fields valid, email not already registered

400.when: Missing required fields (name, email, or password) OR password shorter than 8 characters

409.when: Provided email already exists in users store

401.when: No session cookie, or session ID not found in sessions store

data_flows.trigger: User submits registration form with valid name, email, password
data_flows.writes_to: in-memory users store (keyed by email) and sessions store (keyed by sessionId)
then_readable_from: GET /api/user/me — returns { name, email } when session cookie is valid
GET /dashboard — server reads session to decide whether to render dashboard or redirect
data_flows.verification: After successful POST /api/auth/register (201), GET /api/user/me should return the same name and email that were submitted
